title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5
4G Band(FDD TDD):
US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Too frustrating to set up
reviews.text: Did not like how complicated it was to set up. It does not have a 1-800 helpline to call. They can take up to 24hrs to respond.

reviews.title: YOU NEED A PHONE TO MAKE THIS WORK
reviews.text: It’s not worth the money. It said you can use it with or without a phone line but it’s not true. You NEED a phone to make this work. I had to return it cus all I wanted was to be able to communicate with my 7yr old when he was on his way home from school on the bus and when he’s outside playing and i didn’t want him to have a phone with him and this watch didn’t work out since you so need a phone for it. I sent it back

reviews.title: RETURNING ITEM IS MORE THAN THE ITEM ITSELF!!!!!
reviews.text: This is shipped from China!  Didn't work like it was supposed to.  Mobile carrier even set up the SIM card.  Only worked when connected to Wifi, which defeats the purpose.  If you try to return the item, it's EXTREMELY difficult and shipping costs more than the watch itself.  Be weary!  Don't purchase!

title: GRV Smart Watch for Men Women, Smartwatch for iOS and Android Phones Personalized Watch Faces IP68 Waterproof, Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate/Blood Oxygen/Sleep Monitor Steps Calories Tracker (Black)
features: 【Fitness Tracker & Blood Oxygen Monitor】 GRV N29 smartwatch tracks your daily steps, heart rate, calorie, sleep quality and distance throughout the day, and records your activity data in the app. Contains 10 different sports modes: indoor walking, outdoor walking, indoor running, outdoor running, outdoor cycling, yoga, spinning, boating, etc. You can measure the body's blood oxygen saturation after exercise or in normal times.

【HD Color Touch Screen & Customized Watch Face】 N29 adopts 1.4" HD sensitive touch screen. The screen brightness is adjustable, which enable you to find a suitable brightness for different using environment, such as at night or in the sun. You can customize the watch face by choosing one from the watch or from the app. There are 30+ dials (Continually updated) in the APP and you can also upload any photos of your family, pets, etc.

【Receive Notifications & Compatibility】 Receive notifications of incoming calls, text messages, messages (such as Facebook, Twitter, Youtube, Instagram, etc.) from smartphone. Note: The watch cannot answer/reply/send texts, messages or calls. The free "InxFit" App supports smartphones with iOS 9.0/Android 5.0 and higher and Bluetooth 5.0.

【Long Battery Life & IP68 Waterproof】 A full charge takes 2 to 3 hours and it can last about 7 days. The watch has a waterproof rating of IP68, which makes it shower proof and wearable in a swimming pool. It would be safe even to submerge up to a depth of 1.5 metres for around half an hour. The strap is changeable and made of soft silicone, very comfortable.

【More Functions & Quality Services】There are other convenient functions, such as music control/drink water reminder/timer/weather reminder/blood oxygen monitor/stopwatch/alarm/breathing training. The functions are easy to access and use. The app syncs well and quickly with the watch. If you encounter any quality or use problems, please feel free to contact us through order and we will give you a satisfactory answer.

title: Apple Watch SE (GPS, 40mm) - Silver Aluminum Case with Abyss Blue Sport Band (Renewed)
description: Stay safe, active, and healthy with the Apple Watch SE. The SE sports the same bright LTPO OLED Retina display as the Series 6, giving you a bright screen you can view at a glance, even in bright sunlight. On it, you can view all of your fitness metrics, health stats, and mobile notifications. When it comes to health, the SE's optical heart rate monitor can give you indicators of a possible medical condition with notifications for high or low heart rates, as well as irregular rhythms. Even healthy habits are supported, such as hand-washing detection, which displays a 20-second animated countdown as you scrub. Fitness is a large part of staying healthy, and the Apple Watch SE has a variety of ways to assist you in reaching your goals. Activity Rings displays three rings that correspond to movement, exercise, and standing. Stay mobile throughout the day to hit new personal bests as you close the rings.You can also choose from a variety of workouts, such as running, swimming, yoga, cycling, and more; with the watch recording and tracking their specific metrics. Whether inside or outdoors, the SE can guide you via GPS and even provide continuous elevation updates on screen. As you move, choose from a variety of music, podcasts, and audiobooks to entertain and motivate you. For added fun, share your activity rings with friends and challenge them to 7-day activity competitions. Throughout the day, the Apple Watch SE keeps you connected with the world around you. When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts directly from your wrist, navigate your surroundings with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to interact with Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch SE is water-resistant up to 164'. Use its 32GB of built-in storage for apps, watch faces, music, and more.
features: LEAVE YOUR PHONE IN YOUR POCKET: Apple Watch SE GPS Model lets you call, text, and get directions from your wrist, while leaving your phone in your pocket. It offers multiple connectivity options, including: Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and NFC to suit your needs, whatever they might be.

LARGE RETINA OLED DISPLAY: The SE sports a bright LTPO OLED Retina display, giving you a bright screen you can view at a glance, even in bright sunlight. A variety of watch faces are available for the SE watch, including faces that provide essential information for specific activities.

LOADED WITH FEATURES: When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts from your wrist, navigate with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to activate Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch SE is water-resistant up to 164'.

WORKOUTS THAT DON'T QUIT: Cycling, yoga, swimming, high-intensity interval training...the list goes on. You name it, Apple Watch measures it. Set workout-specific goals, see full summaries when you're done, and track how you're trending over time in the Activity app on your iPhone.

GET LOST IN YOUR MUSIC: With Apple Music on your wrist, you've got 60 million tracks of musical motivation to take you places. You can also catch up on the latest podcasts or listen to an audiobook if that's your thing. Stream everything you need right from your watch, even without your phone.

reviews.title: fitbit 3 perforated bands
reviews.text: I purchased these after market bands because the 'large' I got with my fitbit 3 was WAY too big.  It's amazing how much better 1" less in the band fits.  It comes with three colors.  The only thing I am not really super happy about is the silver tone buckle - I am nervous about nickle content as it is an allergy thing for me. The original is black and matches the band. You get 3 full bands, One black... one gray.. and one light aqua blue - it's more of a very light gray blue.  They are a rubbery ? silicone like? material. Smooth, no sharp edges.  They attached easily. So far, so good.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

title: Kimnix Smart Watch 2022(Make Call Receive/Dial), 1.72 in HD Full Touch Screen Fitness Tracker with Bluetooth Call/Text/Heart Rate/SpO2/Sleep Monitor Smartwatch for Android iOS Mens Women (Black)

reviews.title: Fair features for the price
reviews.text:
First of all, you must keep in consideration that this is a $50 watch. That being said I will state what I consider are the pros and cons:

Pros
Price, battery life (more than the typical 1-day of apple watches), capable of answering and dialing within the watch (Bluetooth required) and blood oxygen and heart rate sensors.

Cons
Strap does not hold to watch and you must keep correcting it (solved with another strap?), blood pressure monitor? How???, you only have five watch faces at any given time but you can only replace one of the five - the others are permanently set, you get to edit the fourth one by adding a photo

Overall, there are cheaper and better watches like the WYZE (which I own and has better quality) but lack the phone answering and dialing features.

I will be replacing the strap with another type to see if it holds.

reviews.title: It does not keep all of the apps current. That is what I bought it for.
reviews.text: I bought this watch per my doctors request to keep health issues.  I only use it for this feature.  But to my amazement, It does not do as it states.  As I use only the medical aspects only I would expect it to work perfectly.

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 4 Classic 42mm Smartwatch with ECG Monitor Tracker for Health Fitness Running Sleep Cycles GPS Fall Detection Bluetooth US Version, Black (Renewed)
description: This pre-owned or refurbished product has been professionally inspected and tested to work and look like new. How a product becomes part of Amazon Renewed, your destination for pre-owned, refurbished products: A customer buys a new product and returns it or trades it in for a newer or different model. That product is inspected and tested to work and look like new by Amazon-qualified suppliers. Then, the product is sold as an Amazon Renewed product on Amazon. If not satisfied with the purchase, renewed products are eligible for replacement or refund under the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.

features: 【Heart Rate Monitor & Sleep Monitor】Built-in PPG heart rate sensor coupled with HR algorithm, the smart watch can accurately monitor your heart rate during wearing. All health tracking metrics can help you get a better understanding of your health and make reasonable adjustments to your lifestyle.

The fitness tracker supports 18 sports modes: running, walking, climbing, cycling, basketball, football, tennis, aerobics, yoga, rope jumping, sit-ups, swimming, etc. Can give you more detailed insights into your whole day's activities and improve your athletic performance. Stay motivated all day!

【Long Battery Life & 5ATM Waterproof】The fitness tracker for men is equipped with a 170mAh Li-Polymer battery, only takes 2 hours to get fully charged by a magnetic charging cable to support 7 days of normal use. The fitness watch is 5ATM waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain, or swimming in the shallow water, which allows you to swim in the pool with it without worries. (Note: Do Not support hot water shower, diving, surfing, saunas, spring, etc).

The smartwatches also feature remote control of music and camera, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, timer, a compass to meet your daily needs.

reviews.title: Keep track
reviews.text: This fitness tracker is simple to setup and in no time it'll be keeping track of your health so you have a monitor of what you do every day. It's simple to track and manage your sleep patterns or steps you take in a day. Very simple to use mobile app. The watch lasts a long time before dieing at least 2 days

reviews.title: Super impressed with this watch. Truly remarkable
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:ae47b9651b52b2c1b0485219f33680bf]] Wow. I am not impressed by much, but this watch is truly impressive for this price point.

Build: Very good build quality. The waterproof case feels solid, with responsive buttons and full color high res screen. Bracelet is soft rubber and is very comfortable. It's a very large band, so large or small wrists will fit in here.

Features: Though not perfect, the features on this watch are impressive. Measures steps, activities, heart rate, laps, sleep quality. Very very nice featuers. Plus it's waterproof!!!

Cons: Some of the interfaces are a bit clunky, and the app could use work, but it's fairly intuitive, and easy to use. I connected to my Galaxy S7 with no problems.

I recommend this watch!

reviews.title: My favorite budget smart watch
reviews.text:
I've tried a variety of budget smart watches, and this one by Dr.Viva has become my favorite. It's very comfortable, great flexible band, no issues with feeling like it's pressing into my wrist bones. The screen display is a good size without being too large, perfect for smaller wrists.

The Zeroner app has been fantastic, no problems. It accurately tracks my steps, sleep & oxygen. I like how it has a variety of exercises for me to document. The battery life is a big winner. I recharge the smart watch once a week, compared to twice a week with the other watches I've tried before. I was disappointed that I don't have the option to have my own picture as the screen display, but the app still has plenty of screens to choose from.

If you're like me and don't want to spend an exorbitant price on a smart watch, but would still like to enjoy the features of a smart watch this one would be a great option.

reviews.title: Inaccurate
reviews.text: This is a cute watch. Set up was simple. I liked the pink band and it was comfortable. The multi-lingual instructions are useless. Even worse it is inaccurate. I was at my desk and took it off. When I came back it said I logged 1800 steps.  It was sitting in the same place on the desk. Not. Back to my fit bit.

reviews.title: Very Durable and Love the Face
reviews.text:
The watch and band are more durable than I expected at this price point. The watch is very easy to install and should not take more than 5 minutes. For some reason I really like the aesthetics on the face of the watch.

I have another watch that is comparable and this watch costs 25% less. This is definitely good value. A watch like this is a game changer for people monitoring heart issues. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Nice resolution
reviews.text:
I bought this watch because of the high-resolution display. And that's what I got, no more, no less.

Upon first impression, I can tell the display has crisp graphics. The touch screen is responsive. The processor is fast. Overall, the phone itself is nice.

The app, on the other hand, is awful. It is intuitive, but it loses Bluetooth connectivity without reason. This is the only app that I've seen that will move forward and backward during a dial sync. When I switch to certain dials, the progress bar will reach 61%, then count back down to 60%, then 59%, then start going back up. It's nice to see honesty in an app, but it's just strange.

I didn't test notifications from other apps, but no SMS text messages came through. The setup is simple and easy with SMS notifications settings on its own section. But once set up, no messages came through.

Battery life? What battery life? After a fully charge, this watch drained to 90% in the 15 minutes I used to overlook the features and set up the app. This from a 330mAh battery. At this rate, the battery will be depleted in less than two hours.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: What a piece of junk. The instructions don't match the watch or the Amazon description and is written in awful broken English. And the app--- AWFUL. Navigation is bad, the English on the app is even worse than the instructions. I'm seriously concerned that downloading the app has somehow compromised anything on my phone. While I understand Amazon is a gigantic company that can't police every single item for sale, this is just BLATANTLY bad. In case my review isn't already clear, DO NOT BUY.

reviews.title: Great watch for the price
reviews.text: It was very difficult for me to set up this watch until I scanned the scan code from the pamphlet. The directions weren't easy. I think I would like a watch a little smaller but I like the shape and bands.  The price was great. I'm still not sure about the sleep mode, nothing seems to be registering. Steps are showing up which is cool, BPM is registering. Still figuring it out. Arrived promptly.  Additional info: the watch is NOT tracking my erratic sleep pattern, which I really needed it to do. I also found the size of the round watch intrusive to my long sleeve shirts and arm. Loved the pink and green bands and the color of the watch face. Steps are also not being accurately recorded. So sad, really had high hopes for this.

reviews.title: Worth the money n saved my life
reviews.text: Love the feminine color. Easy to see. Helps me keep track of certain health irregularities as they happen therefore possibly averting a health emergency. Ty for having an ingenious machine in such a lovely and compact device.

reviews.title: Superb smart watch! Excellent value! 🙌🏻💰
reviews.text:
This is an excellent watch especially for those who are very concerned about their overall health. I have a lot of health challenges and so it's important for me to be monitoring certain aspects like blood pressure, heart rate, and oxygen saturation. I'm typically someone who has high blood pressure have a pre-existing condition. This determines whether I can donate plasma, if I'm consuming too many calorie rich foods or if I should be concerned for my heart rate.

I love how this watch is very mindful of how long you've been sitting because I'm guilty of spending hours on the couch. Despite my poor health, it still essential to get up every once in a while and move around to get the blood flowing. This watch has excellent battery life I've only had to charge it one time since I've had it and I've had it now for over a month! Even being connected to Bluetooth on your phone it does not drain the battery quickly which is awesome! Pairing was super easy, just download the app pair it and set it and forget it. The watch and my phone always per immediately I've never had to fuss around with anything just great! I would highly recommend this watch to anyone. Certainly keeps me active and gives me all the important information I need to know on a daily basis 🙌🏻👍🏻🫁🏆

reviews.title: Great replacement bands for the Fitbit Charge 5
reviews.text: These bands fit well on the Fitbit Charge 5, as a replacement for a damaged band or just to change up the look now and then.  They are easy to install and remove and they do give an entirely different look to the Charge 5. I have the Large size and they are the same length as the original band that came with the Fitbit.  The colors as presented in listing are accurate and, in fact, I liked the teal and purple even more when I saw them in person.  There's only one noticeable difference between these bands and the original band.  The original band is quite smooth while these bands have some friction to them when you run you fingers over them.  Neither texture is better than the other. They're just different. My original band is black and absent the difference in feel, there's no real distinction vs. the black band that I received in this six pack.

reviews.title: Smart watch
reviews.text: Orginally when we received this watch and had to put it together, download the app and set up the watch , I was worried we were in over our heads for set up.  But after a little brain power , and we got the watch working , it seems like a more economical apple watch. Its very classy , has a built in phone that we hooked to a apple I phone. Its also has all the health capabilities. Seems like a good alternative to the more expensive brand name watches.

reviews.title: Outstanding value
reviews.text: I got this for my spouse who has an android phone.  He absolutely loves it!  He was so thrilled with it and how easy it was to set up and use that he gave me a list of the pros and cons. Pros: comfortable; stylish (never heard him use that word before lol); there's a watchface for all tastes and occasions; the features are intuitive and the charge lasts for 24+ hours.  The only cons he mentioned was that it did not give an approximate charge time and that he can't figure out how to add contacts. I've never seen him so enthusiastic about a fitness watch before and he previously disdained them. Based on his experience, I would highly recommend this one.

reviews.title: It works as a watch but most other functions are suspect
reviews.text:
This smart watch looks nice enough - someone could easily confuse it for an older Apple Watch - and its easy to make custom watch faces (I put a pic I took at an Iron Maiden show on mine). And it is jam packed with features - way more than some other watches in this price range.

Unfortunately, I have trouble trusting its more advanced features.

A number of times when taking my temperature the watch says I have hypothermia, measuring me between 87-95f. I am a 200lb man living in in Southern California and my wife won’t turn the thermostat down below 74 degrees. I don’t have hypothermia. If it can’t properly read my body temperature, there’s no way I can trust its accuracy with many of the other health features - blood oxygen, blood pressure, heart rate, etc

That step count seems pretty accurate but ONLY once I paired the watch with the Da Fit app. Before I paired the watch, it measure me taking like 350 steps while just sitting on my couch. Not sure why it would measure differently paired or unpaired but it did - significantly. I would not recommend this as a fitness tracker for someone without a smart phone (yes, there are still a few people without smart phones).

And the sleep tracker seems to at least get my sleep times accurate, though I am unsure how well it reads light/deep sleep as I don’t really trust the readings from it’s health sensors. I want to believe its doing a good job. I like the way the app presents the sleep timeline and information. But I just don’t know if its accurate because the watch thinks I have hypothermia.

As for the non-health related functions, they are pretty spotty too. I stopped receiving text notifications after a couple days and could not get them to start back up again without completely disconnecting the phone from the app and starting over again.

Pros:
- Looks like an old gen Apple Watch.
- Customizable face
- Lots of features
- Doesn’t technically *need* a smart phone for many features
- Step counter seems accurate when paired
- Great battery life for a smart watch. I wore it for 5 days without charging.
- Nice app

Cons:
- Highly inaccurate step counter when it is not paired
- Health features are unreliable
- Notifications are unreliable
- The speaker in the watch sounds terrible
- Vibration function is weak and easily missable in active situations
- Sometimes the watch doesn’t ‘wake’ from sleep as easily/instantly as it should. I find myself having to give it an extra shake to wake it almost every time.

reviews.title: Great affordable smartwatch
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:52a9c3b58a7816ac48b831c65b3aa6ca]] This is a great smartwatch at a reasonable price. It works really well, making and receiving calls, and all of the other features. It is lightweight and charges really fast. The battery life is really good too. You cannot beat the price. Great value and highly recommended.

reviews.title: Unboxing
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:53bca64d7f3459321ad803eb09c234eb]] Let's start off with what I liked. I liked that is not heavy and feels comfortable. I like the size of the overall screen of the watch. I liked that it is easy to connect to your android device. I do not like that after a free trial service of the texting and monitoring of all the apps, you have to purchase monitoring space or data. I don't like that you are limited to how many contacts you can store on the device. I do not like the overall "ability to text feature." I feel that the text input data can be improved. Down to what and how you reply via messages.
